$comment: Velarro Estate — screen manifest. STATUS: BLOCKED. The Figma MCP monthly rate limit (View seat, 6 calls/month) was hit before any node data was retrieved on 2026-07-01. Zero screens have been enumerated; the totals below are real, not placeholders to be trusted. The continuation run (docs/figma/continuation-prompt.md) fills the screens array using the schema in _screenSchema.

totals.note: UNKNOWN true total — wireframe section was never enumerated

_screenSchema.figmaFrameName: string — exact frame name from Figma, unmodified
_screenSchema.pageName: string — Figma page containing the frame
_screenSchema.suggestedRoute: string — Next.js App Router path, e.g. /properties/[id]
prototypeDestinations: array of { trigger, targetNodeId, targetFrameName, transition }
_screenSchema.surfaceType: page | modal | drawer | dropdown | overlay | state
reusableComponents: array of component IDs from component-inventory.json
assetDependencies: array of asset IDs from asset-inventory.json
responsiveVariants: array of nodeIds of the same screen at other breakpoints
interactionStates: array — hover/focus/error/empty/loading states found as separate frames or in prototype
_screenSchema.verificationSource: Figma verified | Prototype verified | Metadata verified | Assumption requiring confirmation
